name: The Scour
descriptionSeed: A city of controlled ruin and beautiful demolitions, where ending a thing WELL is a craft and the world is held to be choked with what should have ended. The Unmakers are not nihilists — they are gardeners with a very long view of what needs clearing, and they are usually right, and being usually right is not the same as being welcome.
encounterFlavor: Unmakers who look at your work and see where it should end; a demolition that is genuinely beautiful; a Wright envoy in visible distress.
questSeeds: Something is being scheduled for ending and the Unmakers are RIGHT and it is beloved
An Unmaker has ended something that should have stood, and knew it, and did it anyway
